internal_funcs.name: main
internal_funcs.role: entry point — boot telemetry, wire API, select transport, run

internal_funcs.name: wireAPI
internal_funcs.role: opens Postgres and Neo4j, builds query.APIRouter, wraps with auth, mounts admin mux

internal_funcs.name: newMCPQueryRouter
internal_funcs.role: constructs query.APIRouter with all handlers for MCP use

internal_funcs.name: openQueryGraph
internal_funcs.role: opens Neo4j driver unless PCG_DISABLE_NEO4J or lightweight profile

internal_funcs.name: mountRuntimeSurface
internal_funcs.role: creates shared admin mux via internalruntime.NewStatusAdminMux

telemetry.spans: none emitted by this package directly; inherited from internal/query handlers
telemetry.metrics: pcg_runtime_info emitted by internalruntime.NewStatusAdminMux; per-query metrics from internal/query

stdio_mode.note: no HTTP listener; admin surface not mounted; reads stdin, writes stdout

shutdown.mechanism: signal.NotifyContext cancels root context; server.RunHTTP or server.Run unblocks; telemetry.Providers.Shutdown on fresh background context

invariants: Validation errors (bad API key, bad query profile, bad graph backend) fail before any datastore connection is attempted
PCG_POSTGRES_DSN or PCG_CONTENT_STORE_DSN must be non-empty or wireAPI returns an error
stdio mode does not mount the HTTP admin surface
query.AuthMiddleware wraps the query mux protecting /api/v0/* routes
lifecycle_summary: main boots telemetry via telemetry.NewBootstrap, constructs an slog.Logger, initializes OTEL providers. wireAPI opens Postgres (sql.Open + PingContext), optionally opens Neo4j via internalruntime.OpenNeo4jDriver, constructs a query.APIRouter via newMCPQueryRouter, wraps it with query.AuthMiddleware, and mounts the shared admin surface. Transport selection reads PCG_MCP_TRANSPORT: stdio calls mcp.Server.Run; http calls mcp.Server.RunHTTP with PCG_MCP_ADDR. Shutdown is driven by context cancellation from signal.NotifyContext.

entry_points.name: main
entry_points.role: entry point — boot telemetry, wire API, select transport

entry_points.name: wireAPI
entry_points.role: constructs and returns the query handler, admin mux, and cleanup func
